## Experiment

Enumerate nonisomorphic bipartite graphs with at most three latent sources and four searchers under a fixed rational source accuracy. Group graphs by exact pairwise report moments and compare protocol discovery within groups.

## Guardrails

Record canonical graph labels, conditional-independence assumptions, exact joint distributions, enumeration completeness, and the distinction between observable identification and known-provenance prediction.

## Completion test

Produce either an exact paired insufficiency witness or a certified null result for the declared graph class, with an independent enumeration check.
